tags.name: `mc-drawer`
tags.description:
Purpose: A drawer is a type of panel that slides in from the side of the screen to provide additional content or functionality.
Category: Content Display
When to use: When you need to display supplementary content without navigating away from the current view.
When not to use: When you need to display critical information that requires immediate attention.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-checkbox, mc-date-range, mc-input-date, mc-input-time, mc-input, mc-multi-select, mc-number-stepper, mc-radio, mc-select-native, mc-select, mc-switch, mc-textarea, mc-typeahead-multi-select, mc-typeahead
Alternative component names: Sidebar, Panel, Flyout, Slider

Events:

  * `closed` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - The closed event gets dispatched once the drawer is closed.

  * `closing` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - The closing event gets dispatched once the drawer is closing.

  * `opened` {`CustomEvent`} - The opened event gets dispatched once the drawer is opened.

  * `opening` {`CustomEvent`} - The opening event gets dispatched once the drawer is opening.

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - The click event gets dispatched when clicked on the dialogaction button within a drawer.

Slots:

  * ``default`` {} - The body HTML to use for the drawer.

  * ``heading`` {} - Used for the heading of the drawer.

  * ``footer`` {} - Used for the footer of the drawer. Often contains the close button.

Attributes:

  * `position` {Position} - The position of the drawer.

  * `backdropcloseactiondisabled` {`boolean`} - Disables closing the drawer when clicking outside of it.

Properties:

  * `resizeObserver` {`ResizeObserver | null`} - 

  * `touchStartX` {`number`} - 

  * `touchEndX` {`number`} - 

  * `touchStartY` {`number`} - 

  * `touchEndY` {`number`} - 

  * `minSwipeDistance` {`50`} - 

  * `boundHandleTouchStart` - 

  * `boundHandleTouchEnd` - 

  * `showclosebutton` {`boolean`} - 

  * `closeonclickoutside` {`boolean`} - 

  * `open` {boolean} - Opens the drawer.

  * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

  * `position` {Position} - The position of the drawer.

  * `width` - 

  * `height` {string} - 

  * `customsize` - Sets the custom size of the drawer.
If the position is set to left or right, the width will be adjusted.
If the position is set to top or bottom, the height will be adjusted.
You can also set the custom size for different breakpoints by passing an object with the breakpoint sizes i.e.


{
xs: '100%',
sm: '400px',
md: '500px',
lg: '600px',
xl: '50%'
}

`,

  * `dimension` {dimension} - The dimension of the drawer.
The dimension depends on the position of the drawer and are as follows:

small:
- left: width: 320px, height: 100dvh
- right: width: 320px, height: 100dvh
- top: height: 320px, width: 100dvw
- bottom: height: 320px, width: 100dvw

medium:
- left: width: 480px, height: 100dvh
- right: width: 480px, height: 100dvh
- top: height: 480px, width: 100dvw
- bottom: height: 480px, width: 100dvw

large:
- left: width: 800px, height: 100dvh
- right: width: 800px, height: 100dvh
- top: height: 800px, width: 100dvw
- bottom: height: 800px, width: 100dvw

  * `disablestickyfooter` {boolean} - Disables the sticky footer when scrolling

  * `nonmodal` {boolean} - If true, the drawer will open as a non-modal drawer, allowing page interaction.

  * `nopadding` {boolean} - If true, the drawer content will have no padding.

  * `backdropcloseactiondisabled` {`boolean`} - Disables closing the drawer when clicking outside of it.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description:
`position` {Position} - The position of the drawer.

Property: position

Default: right

attributes.name: backdropcloseactiondisabled
attributes.description:
`backdropcloseactiondisabled` {`boolean`} - Disables closing the drawer when clicking outside of it.

Property: backdropcloseactiondisabled

Default: false

attributes.name: onclosed
attributes.description: `closed` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - The closed event gets dispatched once the drawer is closed.

attributes.name: onclosing
attributes.description: `closing` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - The closing event gets dispatched once the drawer is closing.

attributes.name: onopened
attributes.description: `opened` {`CustomEvent`} - The opened event gets dispatched once the drawer is opened.

attributes.name: onopening
attributes.description: `opening` {`CustomEvent`} - The opening event gets dispatched once the drawer is opening.

attributes.name: onclick
attributes.description: `click` {`MouseEvent`} - The click event gets dispatched when clicked on the dialogaction button within a drawer.
